items.text: I brush my teeth every morning.
I need to use the bathroom.

items.hint: 我最喜欢的水果是苹果。

items.text: The water is nice and warm.
Time to put on my pajamas.
Can you read me a story?
Run as fast as you can
I love running on the grass!
The grass is soft and green.
What do we need to buy?

items.hint: 这个苹果看起来很好吃！

items.text: I want the big one please.
We need to wait in line.
I can see outside the window.
Which animal shall we see first?
I can jump like a monkey!

items.hint: 告诉我你最喜欢的部分

items.text: My name is ..., nice to meet you.
I am sitting in row two.
Hang your coat on the hook.
My coat is on the hook.
I can write on the board!

items.hint: 我可以和你们一起玩吗？
我们比赛跑到滑梯那边！

items.text: Ready or not here I come!
Ready or not, here I come!

items.hint: 我们来一起分享这个玩具吧！

items.text: Can I have a turn please?
